name: F1 Racing Game FormulaX Car Racing VR

reviews.review_description: This F1 car racing game delivers an exciting racing experience with fast-paced gameplay, smooth controls, and realistic tracks. The F1 racing game visuals and competitive feeling make every race enjoyable and immersive.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the amazing review! We're glad you're enjoying the gameplay, controls, and racing experience. Our team is actively developing new content and improvements, and we look forward to bringing you even more exciting updates. Thanks for your support! 🏎️🏁

reviews.review_description: Been playing Formula Car Racing for a while now and its genuinely fun. The racing feels smooth and the graphics are decent. Wish they'd add more customization. Hope updates come soon!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you're enjoying the game. More customization options are on the way, and our next update is expected within the next 1–2 days. Stay tuned! 🚗💨

reviews.review_title: Great game, just needs more content
reviews.review_description: F1 Racing VR is genuinely addictive, I’ve been playing it more than I expected 😅. Driving the cars, taking corners at high speed, and the overall racing experience feels really satisfying. The gameplay is smooth and easy to enjoy. AI opponents could still use some improvements though — sometimes they feel a bit unrealistic. More tracks, car customization, and different race modes would make this an even better game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're happy you're enjoying F1 Racing VR. We're working on improving AI opponents and adding more tracks, cars, customization options, and game modes in future updates. Stay tuned, and thanks for your support! 🏎️🏁

reviews.review_description: The formula 1 car racing game is the best game i have played

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support! We're thrilled that you're enjoying F1 Racing VR. Your feedback motivates us to keep improving and adding more exciting content. 🏎️🏁❤️

reviews.review_description:
this is terrible
not worth the $8 i paid for it

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your feedback. We'd like to clarify that the game is not currently priced at $8. Since your review, we've released multiple updates with fixes and improvements. The game is still under active development, and we're continuously working to make it better. We'd appreciate it if you could try the latest version and consider updating your review if your experience has improved. Thank you for your support.
